ideation: This sequence simulates the feeling of a vibrating phone, using a rhythmic, subtle shaking motion. The arms will move slightly up and down, creating a gentle vibration effect. I'll ensure the movements are smooth and natural, using small adjustments to the joint angles to avoid a rigid, mechanical look.  I'll maintain a relatively neutral posture, with the arms slightly forward, to suggest the phone is being held.  The wrists will remain neutral throughout to keep the focus on the subtle up-and-down motion. This sequence should convey the subtle yet persistent vibration of the phone.

frames.beat: arms held forward, a subtle hum begins
a slight upward tremor, the vibration builds
a gentle downward shake, the phone buzzes
the vibration settles, returning to rest
